cita: "If you can't explain it, you didn't build it — you only generated it."

pilares.descripcion: Use any tools you want — Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, no-code. What matters is the outcome and that you understand it.
Explain what the AI did, why it works, and how you'd change it without starting from zero.
Launch to real users who give feedback. Iterate based on real usage, not guesses.

hitos.descripcion: Plan your solution and define the technical approach
Build and ship your first working version
Collect feedback from real users and iterate

preguntasValidacion: Can you explain what each part of your code does?
Can you spot where the AI applied specific concepts?
Can you change the solution without asking the AI to redo everything?
Can you defend your architecture and technical decisions?
